description: Style Notebasics adds a sense of sophistication and style to your outfit with this belt. With a rustic and contemporary look, tune up your style quotient with this belt - wear with denim shorts, jeans, or even light coloured formal pants.Product DetailsTan belt split into segment, all held together with leather strap sutures, metal buckle and five buckle holesMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
